title: Project Input
description: Strukturerad tolkning av operatörens Init Prompt och konkreta kund-/site-data. Driver vad sajten ska handla om (företagsfakta, ton, tjänster, kontakt). En Project Input är inte en Dossier - en Dossier är en återanvändbar capability, ett Project Input är ett konkret kundprojekt. Filer: examples/<siteId>.project-input.json. Naming-dictionary id: projectInput (canonical 'Project Input', ADR 0012).

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference. Should be relative to this file under governance/schemas/.

siteId.description: Stable id for this Project Input. Matches the filename stem (examples/<siteId>.project-input.json).

scaffoldId.description: Pinned Scaffold id from packages/generation/orchestration/scaffolds/. produce_site_plan honors this as a hard pin in the planning helper.

variantId.description: Pinned Scaffold Variant id. Must be one of the scaffold's variants/<variantId>.json.

language.description: BCP-47-ish language tag (sv, en, en-GB). Used by builder for copy generation.

starterId.description: Optional Starter pin. When present produce_site_plan validates that the starter exists on disk and matches the canonical scaffold->starter mapping (data/starters/README.md scaffold-starter-mapping block).

company.description: Required fields are the ones scripts/build_site.py renders directly into TSX (name + tagline + story + businessType). team / founded are optional - team defaults to [] and the renderers handle that.

heroHeadline.description: Operatörens explicita hjälterubrik (hero-H1) satt via en följdprompt. Renderaren föredrar detta fält över den auto-genererade blueprint-rubriken (contentBlocks.home.hero.headline, härledd ur briefModel positioning.oneLiner som regenereras varje bygge) så att en 'ändra hero-texten till X'-följdprompt faktiskt syns i den stora rubriken och överlever ett ombygge. Saknas på init och de flesta byggen - då används blueprint-rubriken eller company.name. Sätts av merge_followup_project_input när en copyDirective med target tagline appliceras (mirror av company.tagline); cappas i kod till 140 tecken som tagline. company-name-direktiv rör inte fältet (namnet hör hemma i nav-header/footer, inte hero-H1).

location.description: city + serviceAreas are required because the renderers index them directly. country/region are optional metadata.

items.description: summary is required because render_home and render_services render it as a paragraph; an absent summary would crash the builder with KeyError.

products.description: Optional ecommerce product catalogue. When present, product-grid renderers prefer this over services. productImage carries an operator-uploaded AssetRef; build_site.py copies it into public/products/<productId>.<ext> and writes imageUrl to that public path before rendering.

requestedCapabilities.description: Capability slugs from governance/policies/capability-map.v1.json. Empty list is valid (no extra capabilities requested).

directives.description: Additiva wizard-direktiv som buildern kan konsumera deterministiskt utan att ändra scaffold- eller variant-scheman.

sectionTreatments.description: Operator-pin för section design treatments (Phase 3). Resolve-ordning vid render: operator-pin (denna map) > variant-default (_SECTION_TREATMENTS_BY_VARIANT i packages/generation/build/dispatcher.py) > section-default. Tomt objekt eller saknad property = falla tillbaka till variant/section-defaults. ADR 0032 förklarar valet av additiv direktiv-utbyggnad och varför fältet inte bryter befintliga PI-snapshots (på origin/main pre-port var detta ADR 0031). Treatment-IDs per section är medvetet en sluten enum-lista här så schemavalideringen fångar typos innan bygget startar.

selected-work-preview.description: selected-work-preview — render_section_selected_work_preview. editorial-stack = section default; asymmetric-grid mappas mot studio-monochrome; marquee-row mappas mot bold-electric.

treatment-list.description: treatment-list — render_section_treatment_list (clinic-healthcare). minimal-rows = section default; split-cards mappas mot warm-care; numbered-stack mappas mot modern-precision.

practice-grid.description: practice-grid — render_section_practice_grid (professional-services). dense-grid = section default; tabular mappas mot legal-classic; grouped mappas mot accounting-trust.

expertise-areas.description: expertise-areas — render_section_expertise_areas (professional-services home). numbered-2col = section default; tag-cluster mappas mot consulting-modern.

service-list.description: service-list — render_section_service_list (LSB). card-grid = section default; alternating-rows mappas mot warm-craft; icon-strip mappas mot clinical-calm; tabular mappas mot nordic-trust.

notesForPlanner.description: Operatörens fritext-orientering till planningModel (Gap 5). Concat av answers.specialRequests + uniqueSellingPoints från wizardens steg 3, byggd av composeMasterPrompt i apps/viewser/components/discovery-wizard/wizard-payload.ts:496-514. Resolvern persisterar fältet utan att tolka det; build_site.py:build_site_brief prepend:ar det på SiteBrief.notesForPlanner med prefix 'Operator: ' så planner ser operator-intent först. Cappa vid 1024 tecken — räcker för 2-3 stycken fri text utan att svälla planner-prompten.

requestedCapabilities.description: Wizard-valda capability-slugs (Gap 4) mappade från answers.selectedFunctions via FUNCTION_GROUPS-tabellen i apps/viewser/components/discovery-wizard/wizard-constants.ts. Resolvern merge:ar dessa deterministiskt i project_input.requestedCapabilities innan _resolve_capabilities() klassificerar dem via capability-map.v1.json. Source-prioritet: directive > wizard.mustHave-derived > taxonomy > brief.

copyDirectives.description: Strukturerade copy-ändringar tolkade ur en följdprompt (ADR 0034 väg A, GAP-followup-prompt-content-passthrough). Varje direktiv är ett validerat target+operation+payload-tripp som merge_followup_project_input applicerar på ett specifikt strukturerat fält (t.ex. company.name) INNAN renderern kör. Fältet finns för spårbarhet: build-result redovisar att en följdprompt faktiskt nådde en synlig effekt. Rå följdprompt renderas aldrig okontrollerat som kundcopy — bara den validerade payloaden, till ett känt fält. Listan ersätts per version (inte ackumulerad) så _has_copy_directives i build_site.py reflekterar exakt den aktuella versionens tolkade direktiv. Targets utökas i slices: nivå 1 = company-name + tagline; slice 2a lägger about-text (company.story); slice 2c lägger services (services[].summary, via targetRef); cta är senare slice (tone hoppas — täcks av tone-shift).

target.description: Vilket strukturerat copy-fält direktivet träffar. company-name = company.name (rendras i nav-header + hero-H1). tagline = company.tagline (hero-underrubrik). about-text = company.story (om oss-/berättelse-copy); replace-text only. services = en specifik tjänsts services[].summary (slice 2c); kräver targetRef + replace-text only.

operation.description: replace-text = sätt fältet till payload. include-token = lägg till payload i fältet om den inte redan finns (additiv, för 'inkludera X i hero'-fall). about-text och services stödjer bara replace-text.

payload.description: Den validerade copy-strängen (nytt namn, ny tagline, ny om oss-text, ny tjänst-summary eller token att inkludera). Filtrerad genom samma public-copy-guards som tagline/story så operatörens instruktionstext inte kan läcka ut. Koden cappar per target snävare än schemat: company-name 80, tagline 140, about-text 600, services 300.

targetRef.description: Vilken befintlig tjänst direktivet refererar till (services[].id eller services[].label). Krävs när target=services, utelämnas annars. Matchas case-insensitivt mot existerande tjänster vid applicering; ingen träff = honest no-op (skapar aldrig en ny tjänst).

source.description: Hur direktivet härleddes: prompt-rule = deterministisk keyword/regex-extraktor; llm = copyDirectiveModel structured output; explicit = explicit till:-markör i prompten.

allOf.$comment: services måste namnge en befintlig tjänst via targetRef (samma kontrakt som Python-valideringen enforcar).
about-text och services är replace-only; include-token är bara giltigt för company-name/tagline.

uniqueSellingPoints.description: Korta säljpunkter som rendras som chips i hero. Max 4 för att hålla layouten ren.

media.description: Extra operator-uppladdade media-assets som renderas i metadata och hero.

contact.description: All four fields are required because the contact page (render_contact) renders each one directly into TSX. An absent field would crash the builder with KeyError before Quality Gate runs. Operators that want to ship without a phone/email/address must explicitly pass an empty string or list and then take responsibility for the resulting copy.

selectedDossiers.description: Operator-pinned Dossiers. Object form is canonical post-B18; the legacy plain-list form is still tolerated by produce_site_plan via merge_operator_selected_with_helper.

brand.description: Operator-supplied brand assets. Optional - omit when the operator did not upload anything. build_site.py copy_operator_uploads picks these up and copies the bytes from data/uploads/<siteId>/<assetId>/optimized.webp into the generated site's public/uploads/ before render_layout writes the header/footer. logoText/heroText are optional fallback labels render_layout uses when no logo image is set.

gallery.description: Operator-supplied photo gallery. Each item carries a placement hint that build_site.py renderers consult when placing images on home, about, services, projects, products or a dedicated gallery section. GPT Vision proposes the placement; the operator can override in the wizard.

moodImages.description: Operator-supplied mood/reference images for internal planning and Vision context. These asset refs are preserved under Project Input but are not public site assets; build_site.py isolates their bytes under data/uploads/<siteId>/__mood/ instead of public/uploads/.

assetRef.description: Reference to an operator-uploaded image. The bytes live under data/uploads/<siteId>/<assetId>/ (LocalAssetStore today, S3AssetStore tomorrow). filename is what the generated site references as /uploads/<filename>. role and placement drive where the asset is rendered.

sourceUrl.description: Optional public HTTPS URL for optimized asset bytes. When present, build_site.py fetches this URL into public/uploads/<filename> instead of using local data/uploads disk lookup.
